untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (BARR rectangular consolidation lasting 110-143 days) requires multi-bar pattern recognition and duration analysis that cannot be expressed using point-in-time indicators. The signal requires identifying a specific consolidation shape over a defined timeframe, which is outside the scope of single-bar technical indicator conditions. Breakout direction detection also requires pattern state tracking not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: This signal describes a named candlestick pattern (BARR) with specific duration and shape characteristics that require pattern recognition logic beyond standard technical indicators. The entry conditions specify pattern formation and breakout detection, which would need dedicated pattern-matching functions. Used Donchian channels as a proxy for breakout detection (breakout from consolidation high/low), but this does not capture the specific 110-143 day consolidation requirement or the rectangular shape validation. A proper implementation would require custom pattern detection logic.
